_comment: Single source of truth for identity — the plugin ships company-agnostic. The installer (install.sh / install.ps1) prompts for organization / project / company / adoBaseUrl and writes them here; any field left blank keeps the placeholder below. Runtime skills read org/project from CLAUDE.md section 2 (seeded from these values by setup-init Step 5d), and locate the plugin dir by glob so the marketplace name is free. After editing by hand, run scripts/sync-config.sh to propagate into plugin.json (author, repository) and marketplace.json. See DEVELOPER-GUIDE.md > Rebranding / forking.

derived._note: Do not edit — documents how the values above compose. Consumers (install scripts, sync-config.sh) compute these. marketplaceName is auto-derived from organization: '{organization}-marketplace' when a real org is set, else 'local-marketplace'.
